name: Oysters Au Champagne
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook garlic in butter until golden brown.
2. Pour in 1 cup of champagne and let it reduce by half.
3. Add the oyster juice and bring to a simmer.
4. Place oysters on top of the liquid.
5. Sprinkle spinach over the oysters.
6. Reduce heat and prepare the roux sauce by whisking together with the remaining ingredients until smooth.
7. Spread the cooked spinach on a plate.
8. Arrange the cooked oysters on top of the spinach.
9. Pour the roux sauce evenly over the oysters.
